body:
## SCM intercomparison plots against PyCLES LES reference data

This PR adds automated profile and timeseries intercomparison plots for the seven single-column model (SCM) cases in the Prognostic EDMF test suite, comparing ClimaAtmos output against PyCLES large-eddy simulation (LES) reference data.

### What's new

**Reference data** (`Artifacts.toml`)
- Registers a new `pycles_scm_les_data` Julia artifact containing PyCLES LES statistics for Soares, GABLS, BOMEX, DYCOMS-RF01, DYCOMS-RF02, Rico, and TRMM-LBA.

**Post-processing scripts** (`post_processing/`)
- `edmf_scm_intercomparison.jl` — generates a single-case intercomparison figure (12-column grid: 6 thermodynamic profiles, 6 turbulence/dynamics profiles, 4 water-path timeseries). ClimaAtmos is shown in blue, PyCLES in orange, with ±2σ shading over the last 3 hours.
- `run_all_scm_intercomparisons.jl` — driver that runs all seven cases in pipeline order (Soares → GABLS → BOMEX → DYCOMS-RF01 → DYCOMS-RF02 → Rico → TRMM-LBA) and merges the results into a single joint PDF via `pdfunite`.

Both scripts use `--project=.buildkite` (the shared CI environment), consistent with all other post-processing in the repo.

**CI pipeline** (`.buildkite/pipeline.yml`)
- Adds `key:` identifiers to each of the seven SCM simulation jobs.
- Adds a new *SCM intercomparison plots* step in the Prognostic EDMF group that depends on all seven SCM jobs and uploads `scm_intercomparison.pdf` as a build artifact.


Both the plotting script and the running script were AI generated. Maybe thats ok? Lmk if you want me to clean up anything there or if we are ok with it
title: Testing LES comparison plots for EDMF

body:
## Purpose

Closes #4627.

This PR updates the CLA workflow triggers so the CLA check can run during the review and auto-merge flow for bot-created pull requests.

## To-do

* None.

## Content

* Updated `.github/workflows/cla.yml` to include `review_requested` and `auto_merge_enabled` in the `pull_request_target` event types.
* Preserved the existing CLA triggers for `opened`, `reopened`, `synchronize`, and `merge_group`.
* Expanded the workflow trigger coverage without changing the CLA validation logic itself.

---

* [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: fix: trigger CLA on bot PR review and auto-merge events

body:
Replaces the hand-maintained `update_dev_guides.yml` with the current template from CliMA/DeveloperGuides.

This fixes a permissions bug in the workflow that prevented the monthly sync job from opening PRs correctly.
title: ci: refresh dev-guides sync workflow from template

body: This updates Insolation to v1.2 and CloudMicrophysics to v0.37 (keeps compat with v0.36)
title: Patch release v0.41.2
